cycleNotes: Cycle 7: 32 signals (richest harvest yet). ADO triage hits 140 total. Incident-doc-coordinator CONFIRMED with 28 new occurrences (alert+triage+chat+workflow chain). Three NEW patterns: approval-workflow-orchestrator, recruiting-interview-coordinator, stakeholder-fyi-classifier. Second workflow chain confirmed: alert-triage-resolve-status. New cluster: notification-routing-ecosystem. Meeting output ecosystem hits 206 combined occ. Eval ecosystem: 194 occ, 49.42 hrs/wk.

patterns.label: Azure DevOps Notification Triage
patterns.llmRationale: 140 total across 7 unbroken cycles. +30 this cycle (150 min/wk). Machine-parseable subject prefixes. Most consistent signal in catalog. AutomationScore raised to 93 due to maturity.

patterns.label: Meeting Notes & Action Item Capture
patterns.llmRationale: Cycle 7 +19: meeting notes docs (7), post-meeting workflow chain (12). 74 total, 10.67 hrs/wk. Workflow chain signal is the strongest evidence yet. ValueScore raised to 90.

patterns.label: Agent Eval Setup, Analysis & Standardized Reporting
patterns.llmRationale: Cycle 7 +15: status request threads (8), weekly review with leadership (1), evals metrics dashboard (5), design review (1). 70 total, 14.75 hrs/wk. Highest-value pattern. ValueScore raised to 92.

patterns.label: VoC / Customer Ask Deduplication & Routing
patterns.llmRationale: Cycle 7 +3 from feature status request overlap. 30 total across 7 cycles. Trend stabilized.

patterns.label: Eval Framework Template & Coverage Model Scaffolding
patterns.llmRationale: Cycle 7 +6: sprint/feature spec writing (3), RFC/design doc review (2), sprint planning prep (1). 20 total, 6.5 hrs/wk. ValueScore raised to 88.

patterns.label: Action Items Tracked Across Fragmented Systems
patterns.llmRationale: Cycle 7 +5 from workflow chain signal. Trend upgraded to rising.

patterns.label: Weekly Project Status Report Generation
patterns.llmRationale: Cycle 7 +5: weekly digest emails (4), authored status report (1). 19 total, 4.25 hrs/wk.

patterns.label: External Stakeholder Post-Meeting Recap & Follow-Up Drafting
patterns.llmRationale: Cycle 7 +7: external partner coordination (6), stakeholder demo readout (1). 23 total, 4.24 hrs/wk.

patterns.label: Meeting Transcript to Summary to Loop/PPT Pipeline
patterns.llmRationale: Cycle 7 +3: stakeholder demo prep and workflow chain. AutomationScore raised to 83.

patterns.label: Customer Engagement SDR & Discovery Note Creation
patterns.llmRationale: No direct signal in cycle 7. Holds from prior cycles.

patterns.label: Cross-Tool Issue Thread Fragmentation & Context Loss
patterns.llmRationale: Cycle 7 +20: FYI/looping threads (12), cross-team dependency tracking (8). 59 total, 10.42 hrs/wk. Fragmentation accelerating sharply. ValueScore 88.

patterns.label: Personal Daily Prep & Briefing
patterns.llmRationale: Cycle 7 +5 daily standup prep. ParticipantCount=1 limits value.

patterns.label: Recurring Meeting Agenda Preparation
patterns.llmRationale: Cycle 7 +8: daily standup (5), weekly review (1), sprint planning (1), design review (1). 42 total, 19.67 hrs/wk.

patterns.label: Partner & Customer Eval Enablement Coordination
patterns.llmRationale: Cycle 7 +2: cross-team alignment syncs. 18 total, 11.75 hrs/wk.

patterns.label: Calendar Overload & Meeting Invite Triage
patterns.llmRationale: Cycle 7 +16: meeting invite cascade (15), all-hands (1). 127 cumulative. NEW cascade insight: one change triggers 3-5 downstream invites. ValueScore raised to 84.

patterns.label: Action Item Owner Chasing & Status Follow-Up
patterns.llmRationale: Cycle 7 +4: PM-engineering pings (3), 1:1 follow-ups (1). AutomationScore raised to 75.

patterns.label: Training / Hackathon Event Artifact Coordination
patterns.llmRationale: No signal in cycle 7 (Camp AIR concluded). Trend changed to declining.

patterns.label: Customer Signals Aggregation & Planning Tracker Refresh
patterns.llmRationale: No direct signal in cycle 7. Holds.

patterns.label: Redundant Deck Creation for Overlapping Topics
patterns.llmRationale: Cycle 7 +2: stakeholder demo deck (1), content review deck (1). 11 total.

patterns.label: Access Governance & Compliance Alert Triage
patterns.llmRationale: No direct signal in cycle 7. High automation, low value.

patterns.label: Copilot / Agent Platform Architecture Q&A
patterns.llmRationale: Cycle 7 +15: evals channel threads (10), PM-engineering pings (5). 56 total, 11 hrs/wk. ValueScore raised to 84.

patterns.llmRationale: No direct signal in cycle 7. Holds.

patterns.llmRationale: Cycle 7 +10 inferred. High automation, low value.

patterns.label: Escalation & Follow-Up Email Drafting
patterns.llmRationale: No signal for 2 consecutive cycles. Trend changed to declining.

patterns.label: Last-Minute Review Deck Maintenance Before ROBs
patterns.llmRationale: No signal for 2 consecutive cycles. Trend changed to declining.

patterns.label: FFv2 Flights & Rollout Unblocking Guidance
patterns.llmRationale: No signal for 5+ cycles. ARCHIVED.

patterns.label: Cross-Tool Link Chasing & Access Resolution
patterns.llmRationale: No direct signal in cycle 7. Awaiting confirmation.

patterns.label: Incident Documentation & Response Coordination
patterns.llmRationale: CONFIRMED in cycle 7 with massive evidence: +28 occurrences. Evals regression alerts (7), triage meetings (2), on-call incident chat (12), full workflow chain (7). 30 total, 5.42 hrs/wk. Forms its own workflow chain.

patterns.label: Approval Request & Sign-off Workflow
patterns.llmRationale: NEW in cycle 7. 5 approval/sign-off threads. Structured: request, wait, follow-up, response. 4 participants. Requires 2nd cycle confirmation.

patterns.label: Recruiting & Interview Debrief Coordination
patterns.llmRationale: NEW in cycle 7. Interview debriefs (2) + recruiting chat (6). Requires 2nd cycle confirmation.

patterns.label: Stakeholder FYI & Visibility Loop Classification
patterns.llmRationale: NEW in cycle 7. 12 'looping in' / 'FYI' email threads. High automation (structured subject lines). Requires 2nd cycle confirmation.

patternClusters.label: Eval Ecosystem
patternClusters.clusterInsight: Largest cluster by occurrences. Incident response now confirmed as eval ecosystem member (evals regressions are primary trigger). Unified eval-ops skill suite addresses 49.42 hrs/wk across 5 roles.

patternClusters.label: Meeting Output Ecosystem
patternClusters.clusterInsight: Meeting patterns hit 206 combined occurrences. Full lifecycle (prep, hold, capture, distribute, track, chase) is one workflow.

patternClusters.label: Event & Program Coordination
patternClusters.clusterInsight: Declining post Camp AIR. Two members now declining. Monitor for next event surge.

patternClusters.label: Notification & Triage Ecosystem
patternClusters.clusterInsight: NEW CLUSTER in cycle 7. Four email classification patterns share classify-route-flag archetype. 210 occurrences, only 9.27 hrs/wk (fast per-instance). A unified email classifier skill handles all four.

workflowChains.label: Email to Meeting to Deck to Follow-up Chain
workflowChains.chainInsight: Confirmed in cycle 7 with 12 explicit instances. Full pipeline 90 min/occurrence.

workflowChains.label: Alert to Triage to Resolve to Status Chain
steps: Automated alert email fires (evals regression/threshold breach)
On-call engineer initiates Teams triage thread
Triage meeting called if unresolved in 30 min
Root cause documented in Work Tracker
Status update email sent to stakeholders
workflowChains.chainInsight: NEW CHAIN. 7 explicit end-to-end instances. 60-120 min per incident.

candidateSkills.name: meeting-notes-action-extractor
candidateSkills.description: Ingests meeting transcript, emits structured action items with owner/due-date, decisions log, follow-up email draft, and Work Tracker tasks.
candidateSkills.valueProposition: Replaces 10.67 hrs/week across 4 roles. 74 occurrences over 7 cycles.

candidateSkills.name: ado-notification-router
candidateSkills.description: Classifies ADO notification emails by work-item type, priority, and required action. Routes to right role.
candidateSkills.valueProposition: Eliminates 5.5 hrs/week. 140 occurrences over 7 unbroken cycles.

candidateSkills.name: eval-report-synthesizer
candidateSkills.description: Ingests eval results, metrics dashboards, and coverage data. Produces standardized reports with trend analysis.
candidateSkills.valueProposition: Saves 14.75 hrs/week across 5 roles. Highest value score (92).

candidateSkills.name: eval-template-scaffolder
candidateSkills.description: Generates eval scenario guides, coverage models, feature specs, and RFC templates.
candidateSkills.valueProposition: Eliminates 6.5 hrs/week of parallel template authoring.

candidateSkills.name: voc-ask-deduplicator
candidateSkills.description: RAG-based dedup of Customer Asks against ADO backlog with DRI routing.
candidateSkills.valueProposition: Replaces 30+ manual triage events across 7 cycles.

candidateSkills.name: weekly-status-report-generator
candidateSkills.description: Drafts Loop-formatted status reports from ADO sprint, meeting notes, and metrics dashboards.

candidateSkills.name: meeting-summary-publisher
candidateSkills.description: Converts meeting transcript to canonical Loop summary with optional PPT.

candidateSkills.name: knowledge-context-consolidator
candidateSkills.description: Consolidates fragmented info across Teams, email, SharePoint, and meetings into unified context views.
triggerExamples: What do we know about this?
candidateSkills.valueProposition: Addresses 10.42 hrs/week of fragmentation across 5 participants.

candidateSkills.name: unified-action-item-tracker
candidateSkills.description: Unified action items across Loop, Teams, email, ADO with dedup and overdue flagging.
triggerExamples: What are my open action items?

candidateSkills.name: recurring-agenda-generator
candidateSkills.description: Pre-populates recurring meeting agendas from ADO, blockers, and open action items.

candidateSkills.name: external-meeting-followup-drafter
candidateSkills.description: Drafts post-meeting recap emails for external stakeholders from meeting notes.

candidateSkills.name: incident-response-doc-generator
candidateSkills.description: Auto-generates incident triage thread, postmortem template, and stakeholder update emails.
candidateSkills.valueProposition: Saves 5.42 hrs/week. Core of alert-triage-resolve-status chain.

candidateSkills.name: calendar-triage-advisor
candidateSkills.description: Recommends accept/decline/delegate for meeting invites by priority and calendar load.

candidateSkills.name: copilot-platform-faq-responder
candidateSkills.description: RAG-backed FAQ for Agent 365, eval tooling, and common engineering questions.
triggerExamples: How to set up CLI Evals?
Agent behavior in Teams vs Chat?
